module RefModule(
    input           [15:0]                              imm ,
    input                                               expand  ,
    output          [31:0]                              expand_imm
    wire __expand_imm_tmp = expand ? {{16{imm[15]}}, imm} : {16'h0, imm};
    assign expand_imm = __expand_imm_tmp;

endmodule
